name: DEFECT / DAMAGED PACKAGE - CLEARANCE: Reflex Plus Bentonite Cat Litter - Sensitive Unscented 6L
description: 100% natural bentonite cat litter highly capable of liquid absorption, ideally clumping, perfume-free for cats sensitive to odours. Through compact granule size, it does not stick to your cat?s paws and thus does not spread over the litter box. 100% natural bentonite cat litter highly capable of liquid absorption, ideally clumping, perfume-free for cats sensitive to odours.
